metadata.note: Data compiled from known FAA, DOT, and Census sources. Values marked [ESTIMATE] should be verified with live web research. URLs provided are canonical source locations to check for updates.
metadata.data_confidence: Most infrastructure and demographic data is well-established. Enplanement and EAS figures should be verified for the most recent fiscal year.

airport.name: Western Nebraska Regional Airport / William B. Heilig Field

facilities.terminal: Commercial passenger terminal with TSA screening

enplanements.confidence: [ESTIMATE] Based on FAA ACAIS data trends. BFF typically enplanes 7,000-10,000 passengers annually. Verify at source URL.

operations.confidence: [ESTIMATE] Based on FAA 5010 Master Record and TFMSC data. Typical range 15,000-22,000 annually.

economic_impact.confidence: [ESTIMATE] Based on NDOT Aeronautics Division economic impact studies for Nebraska airports. Small commercial service airports in Nebraska typically show $20M-$40M total economic output.
economic_impact.secondary_source: NDOT Nebraska Airport Economic Impact Study

eas.confidence: [ESTIMATE] EAS subsidy for BFF has historically ranged from $2.5M-$4M annually. SkyWest/United Express has been the primary carrier. Verify current carrier and subsidy at DOT EAS docket.

destinations.confidence: [ESTIMATE] Denver is the mandated EAS hub. Frequency varies by contract period.

county_population.name: Scotts Bluff County
county_population.confidence: Census 2020 figure is confirmed. 2024 estimate based on slight decline trend.

metro_population.name: Scottsbluff Micropolitan Statistical Area
metro_population.note: Scottsbluff Micro area is coterminous with Scotts Bluff County

service_area_population.note: [ESTIMATE] Includes broader catchment in western NE, SE Wyoming, and NE Colorado within ~100 mile radius

nearby_cities.name: Sidney
nearby_cities.role: Cheyenne County seat, within service area

nearby_cities.name: Alliance
nearby_cities.role: Box Butte County seat, within service area

nearby_cities.name: Chadron
nearby_cities.role: Dawes County seat, also EAS community

nearby_cities.name: Torrington
nearby_cities.role: Goshen County WY, cross-state service area

nearby_cities.name: Cheyenne
nearby_cities.role: Larger market to the west (has own airport)

ndot_aviation.agency: Nebraska Department of Transportation - Aeronautics Division
ndot_aviation.notes: NDOT Aeronautics Division publishes periodic economic impact studies and maintains the Nebraska Aviation System Plan. BFF is one of the few commercial service airports in the Nebraska panhandle.

sources.name: FAA Airport Data (5010 Master Record)
sources.data_used: Airport physical characteristics, runway data, based aircraft, operations

sources.name: AirNav.com - KBFF
sources.data_used: Airport reference data, fuel, navaids, communications

sources.name: U.S. DOT Essential Air Service Program
U.S. Census Bureau - Scotts Bluff County
NDOT Aeronautics Division
sources.data_used: State airport system classification, economic impact methodology
